ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, moderator, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "demographic_data" TEXT /* Demographic data of the user (e.g., age, gender, location) */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the video was uploaded */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel hosting the video */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the video's thumbnail */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the video has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the video has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the video has received */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the video */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the video */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the video is a live stream */,
  "live_views" INTEGER /* Number of views during a live stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was created */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers the channel has */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the channel */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the channel */,
  "is_partner" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the channel is a YouTube partner */,
  "last_video_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last video uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "number_of_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has been edited */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the comment */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the comment */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has been reported */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the reply is made to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the reply was made */,
  "number_of_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the reply */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the reply */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the reply has been reported */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the content */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the user is engaging with */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the user is engaging with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, reply, view) */,
  "engagement_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the engagement occurred */,
  "engagement_value" TEXT /* Additional details about the engagement (e.g., number of likes, length of view) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment analyzed */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES comment_replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_extraction" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword extraction result */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment analyzed */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply analyzed */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Extracted keyword */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the keyword */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the keyword was extracted (e.g., title, description, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_extraction_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_extraction_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES comment_replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the user segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the segment was created */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Score that reflects the user's engagement level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)
